# Concepts Index

- [[wiki/concepts/truncated-frontmatter]] — Page with no closing frontmatter fence (edge case: parser robustness)
- [[wiki/concepts/missing-title]] — Page with frontmatter that omits the required `title` field (edge case: lint validation)
- [[wiki/concepts/broken-wikilinks]] — Page with wikilinks to non-existent pages (edge case: wikilink resolution)
